error_signature: Task request timed out after 300 seconds
title: Code node task request timeout in n8n v2
symptom: When executing a Code node, n8n throws a timeout error after 300 seconds. This indicates that the task runner is not available to process the task.
applies_when: Using Code node in n8n v2
root_cause: In n8n v2, Code nodes require task runners to execute tasks. If the runners are not properly configured or if the Cloud Run instance is under-resourced, tasks may time out while waiting for an available runner.
fix_steps: Ensure that N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED is set to true
Set appropriate values for N8N_RUNNERS_MAX_CONCURRENCY and N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_REQUEST_TIMEOUT
Verify the health and capacity of the task runners on Cloud Run
agent_instruction: Configure the task runners in your Cloud Run deployment to ensure they can handle the workload.
